raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Tã ka Leelee un Masee tchai
Seunmē nomirs/ un ue taps ap-
rakti/ tee arri ne taps noschehto-
ti/ un ne weenam buhs fewkah-
du Sihmi eegreest/ nedg kahdn
Pleikti darriht winnu deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Teem arri ne buhs nenee-
ka iedalliht pahr to Roschehlu-
mn/ ka kas taptu eepreezinahts
pahr kahdu Mixoxu/ un ne kas
taps no ta Eepreezinaschanas
Bikera dsirdinahts pahr fawu
Tehwu jeb Mahti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Ne etj arridsan ne kahdā
Dsikru-Naimmā pee teein feh-
deht/ ehst jeb dsert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Jo ta tafka tas KUNGS/
tas Israëta Deews: Reds/ es
likchu no schahs Weetas vreeksh
juhfahm Azzim/ un juhsās Dee-
nās mittetees to Balsi ta Pree-
ka/un to Balsi tahs Lihgsini-
bas / to Balsi ta Bruhdgana/
un to Balsi tahs Bruhtes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un kad tu scheem Laudim
wiffus schohs Wahrdus stahsti-
fi/ un tee uhs tewi fakfa: Ka-
pehz runna tas KUNGS prett
mums wiffu scho leelu Launu-
mu? un kas irr muhfu Nosee-
gums/ un kas irr muhfu Grehki/
ar ko mehs prett to KUNGU
muhfu Deewu efjam apgreh-
kojschees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Tad buhs tew uhs teem
fazziht: Tadeht ka juhsu Teh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wi manni irv atstahjufschi/ fakka
tas KUNGS: Un zitteem Dee-
weem paklatdsinnuschees / un
teem kalpojschi/ un tohs peeluh-
gifschi / bet manni atstahjufschi/
un mannu Bauslibu ne turrej-
fchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un juhs efkat niknaki dar-
rijschi neka juhtu Tehwi. Jo
rangt/ juhs staigajat ikweens
pehz fawas niknas Sirđs Prah-
ta/ un ne klaustat manni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tapehz ismettischu es
juhs no schihg Seunmes/ us wee-
au Semmi/ fo nedg juhs pa-
sihstat nedg juhsu Tehwi/ un tur
juhs kalpofeet zitteem Deeveem
Deenas un Naktis/ tadeht ka es
juhs ne kahdu Schehlastibu
dohfschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Tadeht rangt/ tahs Dee-
nas nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Ka wairs ne taps fazzihts: Tik
teecham/ ka tas KUNGS dsih-
wo/ kas tohs Israëta Behrnuś
no Egiptes-Semnes irr iswed-
dis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Bet tik teescham ka tas
KUNGS dsihwo/ kas tohs Is-
raëta Behrnuś irr no Seemeta
Semnes usweddig/ un no wis-
jahm Sennnehin / kurp wiisch
tohs bij dsinnis/ jo es atwedd-
schu tohs atkat winnu Semmē/
fo es winnu Tehweem efmu
dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Reds/ es fuhtischu pee
dauds Sweineekem/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Teem buhs tohs
sweiioht/ un pehz to fuhtischu es
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
